search_placeholder: Type a word or a description… e.g. run, ഓടുക, feeling of joy
help_quick: Finds words with similar spelling. Works well for approximate matches and typos — runing finds running.
help_exact: Looks up the word exactly as typed (case-insensitive). Use when you know the precise spelling.
help_smart: Finds words by meaning — type a description or phrase: "complete absence of sound", "feeling of nostalgia", "to move quickly on foot". No LLM key required for search. Add an API key to get a prose explanation instead of raw entries.
help_olam: Translate an English word to Malayalam. Uses the Olam dictionary.
help_thesaurus: Find English synonyms and their Malayalam equivalents. Uses the Ekkurup thesaurus.
help_datuk: Look up a Malayalam word with its Malayalam definition. Uses the Datuk dictionary.
ai_synthesis_desc: Without a key, search works fully — Quick, Exact, and Smart all return dictionary entries. Add your own API key to get a plain-language explanation written by an AI. Your key is stored only in this browser, never on our servers.
api_key_hint: Stored only in your browser's localStorage.
corpora_desc: Filter by corpus in Search options on the main page.
corpus_olam_desc: (English → Malayalam) — English words with Malayalam translations.
corpus_datuk_desc: (Malayalam → Malayalam) — Malayalam words with Malayalam definitions.
corpus_ekkurup_desc: (English thesaurus) — English synonym groups with Malayalam equivalents.
